name: Strawberry Rhubarb Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 package Dream Whip or other whipped topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rhubarb and sugar until it becomes a sauce.
2. Prepare the gelatin according to package directions, using a total of 3 cups water. Add the rhubarb mixture and strawberries to the gelatin mixture and pour into a 9x13-inch pan (glass is best). Chill until firm.
3. Prepare the Dream Whip according to package directions, then blend it into softened cream cheese. Spread over the gelatin.
Note: This recipe is from Cornerstones, a cookbook by the Assistance League of Marshalltown, Iowa, p. 145. R. Ottosn rdottosn@csn.org
